name: OBI/Microprice Consensus during Opening Volatility
hypothesis: The strong consensus signal from OBI(1) and microprice deviation is likely most profitable during the high-volatility, information-rich opening session (first 15 minutes), where imbalances resolve more quickly and with greater magnitude.
mutation_note: Following `add_regime_filter` feedback, adding a time-of-day filter to restrict the signal to the opening 15 minutes of the session, aiming to capture higher-magnitude moves.
